title: vangueria verticillata
intro: Vangueria verticillata, also known as the red milkberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vangueria verticillata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Vangueria verticillata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots are also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
